name: 1'8"x2'6" Low Profile Kitchen Mat Light Red Diamond - Room Essentials™
description:
Update your kitchen flooring by the sink or counter with this Low-Profile Diamond Kitchen Mat from Room Essentials™. The rectangular kitchen rug showcases an allover red diamond pattern on a white backdrop for a modern look that blends well with any decor. The polyurethane material provides soft underfoot comfort, while a flat pile height makes it suitable for high-traffic areas and easy to clean.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
